title: Smollest Critters
description: Adds Better Baby Mob Models To Minecraft.
body:
This pack adds better baby models to minecraft. 
**Textures: Made by Baha and Synth**
**Models: Made by 3DimensionalGuy**
**Note: This Pack Isn't Compatable With Fresh Animations so pls If Your an Experienced Pack Creator pls Help me make a fa addon pack ty!**
